transcript.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes. Para español, oprima el dos.
Hi, I'd like to schedule an appointment
Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics.
Part of Pretty Good AI.
Hi,
Am I speaking with Jordan?
Oh, I’m sorry, I think you might have the wrong number. This isn’t Jordan, I’m just a patient trying to schedule an appointment.
No problem.
Let's get you scheduled for an appointment.
Hi,
May I have your first name to get started?
Sure, my first name is Alex.
Now have your first name, last name, and date of birth.
My full name is Alex Reynolds, and my date of birth is March 12, 1985.
I heard your birthday is March 12, 1985.
Is that correct?
Yes, that’s correct.
Could you spell your first and last name for me, please?
Sure. My first name: A-L-E-X. My last name: R-E-Y-N-O-L-D-S.
One other phone number do we have on file for you?
Actually, I’d rather not guess. Could you let me know what number you have on file, so I can confirm it?
Please provide your phone number.
Of course, my phone number is 555-237-8943.
I'm not able to find your information in our system right now.
I'll connect you to our patient support team so they can help you schedule your appointment.
Please stay on the line.
Sure, I'll stay on the line. Thanks for your help.
Live transfer isn't available right now since this is a demo clinic.
If you like, I can take down your information and have our clinic support team follow up to help you schedule your appointment.
Would you like to do that?
Yes, that sounds good. Let’s go ahead. What other information do you need from me?
I have your name.
Date of Birth
and phone number.
Is there a specific provider or type of appointment you're looking for, or just the next available?
I'm looking for a general checkup, so the next available appointment works fine.
It looks like I still can't create a case since you're not in our system yet.
I'll document your request for our clinic support team to follow up and help you schedule your checkup.
Please hold on while I make a note for them.
Sure, I’ll hold. Thank you.
Since live support is open,
You'll need to speak with our patient support team directly to finish scheduling.
I recommend calling the clinic again and asking for a team member, or you can wait for a call back.
Sorry I couldn't complete this for you today.
No problem, I understand. I'll wait for that call back. Thanks for your help.
You're welcome.
The clinic support team will reach out as soon as they can to help you schedule your appointment.
Have a great day.
Thanks, you too. Take care.
